code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut current = ""
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if (b >= 48 and b <= 57) or b == 45
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      else
        if string.len(current) > 0
          match string.parse_int(current)
          when Some(v)
            result = list.push(result, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          current = ""
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if string.len(current) > 0
    match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn remove_at(_ xs: List<Int>, _ idx: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  for x in xs
    if i != idx
      result = list.push(result, x)
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let nums = parse_ints(line1)
let total = list.len(nums)

let k = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
when Some(v)
  v
when None
  0
end

let limit = if k < total
  k
else
  total
end

mut remaining = nums
mut taken = 0
mut output = ""

while taken < limit
  match list.max(remaining)
  when Some(m)
    let idx = match list.index_of(remaining, m)
    when Some(i)
      i
    when None
      0
    end
    if taken == 0
      output = "#{m}"
    else
      output = "#{output} #{m}"
    end
    remaining = remove_at(remaining, idx)
    taken = taken + 1
  when None
    taken = limit
  end
end

println(output)
